name: Media Assist for WhatsApp Web
description: Crop, resize, compress and merge opened WhatsApp Web media locally. Pro pipelines automate repeated workflows.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://mediaassist.002529.xyz; img-src 'self' blob: data:; media-src 'none'; font-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; worker-src 'self'
